jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Myntra
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Myntra. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Myntra:
Myntra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra!
